nodes.name: Ornate pitta
nodes.summary: The ornate pitta (Pitta concinna) is a species of bird in the family Pittidae. It is found in Indonesia. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest. It is threatened by habitat loss. References International Ornithological Congress (23 January 2021). "IOC World Bird List". Retrieved 23 January 2021.
nodes.shortSummary: The ornate pitta (Pitta concinna) is a species of bird in the family Pittidae. It is found in Indonesia.
